channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: From KKK halls to slave auction sites, communities rethink historic sites
item.description: Communities across the U.S. are repurposing racist landmarks, such as a former KKK hall in Texas, into positive spaces.

item.title: McConnell ends weeks of silence on his hospitalization
item.description: Sen. Mitch McConnell spoke publicly about his hospitalization Sunday, weeks after a fall. The comments mark his first remarks on the incident.

item.title: Shapiro eyes a Democratic identity fight in 2028, without leading it
item.description: Josh Shapiro says the 2028 presidential race should be a defining battle for the Democratic Party's identity, but he is not yet positioning himself to lead it.

item.title: Lindsey Graham's final push for Saudi-Israel peace
item.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham, who died suddenly Saturday, spent his final weeks working on a new initiative to normalize relations between Saudi Arabia and Israel.
